UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-31-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (D501)

Appearances on THUR-JAN-31-2013:
Plaintiff WILLIE WONG is present with Attorney Daniel Cheung
Defendant JANEVA CHIANG, individually and dba Panda America Center and Chinese American Job Center, is present with Attorney Rita E. Tautkus representing the defendant though limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants, and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement which is NOT filed.

The trial date of FEB-04-2013 is vacated.
